business.title: Tata Trusts review trustee roles at two entities as Maharashtra law caps lifetime positions
business.description: Tata Trusts is currently under the microscope due to its ongoing trustee appointments. Recent legislation in Maharashtra has placed limitations on these positions, striking a chord with the Sir Ratan Tata Trust and the Tata Education and Development Trust. This legislative shift is designed to bolster governance standards and diminish potential legal conflicts.

business.title: Fintech CTO slams Anthropic over mass Claude suspensions, warns developers ‘never put all your eggs in one basket’
business.description: Anthropic suspended over 60 Claude AI accounts for Belo, a fintech startup. Belo CTO Pato Molina criticized the lack of explanation from the company, and said there was only a Google form for an appeal process. After over 15 hours, Anthropic restored access, citing a false positive.
